title: Sign in and continue into a protected destination
description: An existing member can sign in with email and password and continue into a protected area after the post-login redirect.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the post-login redirect page is shown
Verify an authenticated destination is reached

title: Register a new account and reach the authenticated area
description: A new visitor can create an account and arrive at the post-login destination with access to authenticated content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user reaches an authenticated destination

title: Continue into the writing studio after signing in
description: An authenticated user can sign in, reach the post-login destination, and open the writing studio workspace successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to continue into the writing studio
Verify the writing studio workspace is displayed

title: Show sign-in feedback for invalid credentials
description: A visitor entering incorrect credentials sees sign-in validation feedback instead of being granted access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify sign-in validation feedback is visible

title: Open the writing studio after signing in
description: A signed-in user can enter the writing studio and continue working in a protected workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the writing studio workspace is displayed

title: Open chat after sign-in and review prior context
description: A signed-in user can open the Shothik AI chat workspace and see the conversation history and workspace context.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the chat workspace is displayed

title: Send a prompt in chat and receive a response
description: A signed-in user can submit a prompt in the chat workspace and see the assistant response added to the conversation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter a prompt into the chat input
Verify the assistant response is displayed
Verify the conversation history includes the new exchange

title: Create and quality-check writing content
description: An authenticated user can draft long-form writing, run a quality check, and see feedback for the content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the writing studio
Fill in the writing content field with a long-form draft about sustainable urban gardening
Trigger a quality check for the draft
Verify quality check feedback is displayed

title: Open account settings after signing in
description: A signed-in user can reach the account overview from the authenticated area and view account details.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the account overview is displayed

title: Save writing progress and resume editing later
description: An authenticated user can save in-progress writing and return to the same work to continue editing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the writing studio
Fill in the writing content field with a draft about local community food systems
Refresh the writing workspace by reopening it
Verify the saved writing content is still available for editing

title: Recover access from the sign-in page
description: A visitor who cannot sign in can request password recovery and see that the recovery process has started.

steps.description: Verify a recovery initiation confirmation is visible

title: Continue research work after signing in
description: An authenticated user can open the research workspace, create or edit research content, and see the workspace state persist within the session.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the research workspace
Fill in the research content field with notes about renewable energy policy
Trigger a workspace action for the research draft
Verify the research workspace state is displayed

title: Continue a draft in writing studio and run a quality check
description: A signed-in user can create or edit long-form content in writing studio, run a quality check, and keep working on the draft.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter draft content into the editor
Verify quality check results are displayed
Verify the draft remains available for continued editing

description: A visitor can open channel discovery and review available community channels.

title: Load the public homepage successfully

title: Check the health endpoint from the local app
description: A visitor or operator can request the local health endpoint and receive a healthy platform response.

title: Open the swagger JSON endpoint
description: A visitor or operator can request the swagger JSON route and receive a valid protected or healthy response from the app.

steps.description: Verify the endpoint responds without a framework error
Verify the response indicates documentation or access protection

title: Open the public paraphrase tool page
description: A visitor can open the paraphrase tool page and view the core tool interface without signing in.

steps.description: Verify the paraphrase tool page is displayed
Verify the tool editor or input surface is visible

title: Follow the dashboard compatibility redirect
description: A visitor reaching the legacy dashboard route is redirected into the current post-login flow instead of a missing page.

steps.description: Verify the request does not end on a 404 page
Verify the route redirects into the current authentication flow
